conservative.name: Revel in Corruption
conservative.requirements: Engaged with target. You must be a mutant or totally corrupted by Chaos

success.description: You flail about with your mutated appendages, striking the target for normal damage, plus damage equal to the mutation's severity
As above, and one of the wounds inflicted is a critical with severity equal to the mutation (keep revealing wounds until you find one that fits)

chaosStar.description: Suffer wounds equal to the mutation's severity

sigmarsComet.description: The target must make an Average (2d) Resilience (To) or Discipline (WP) check, his choice. If he fails, he gains the mutation

success.description: The Cult Mutant is driven to a terrifying frenzy. The target is struck for normal damage and suffers 1 fatigue
The attack inflicts normal damage, and the target suffers fatigue and stress equal to the number of critical wounds he is currently suffering

bane.description: The target may immediately perform a free manoeuvre after this action is resolved

chaosStar.description: The target may immediately retaliate with a Basic Melee Attack after the attacker completes this action
